testcase.name: testAnotherUserWhoDoesNotQualify

error.message: PreparedStatementCallback; bad SQL grammar [ SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM transactions t JOIN products p ON t.product_id = p.id WHERE t.user_id = ? AND p.type = 'DEBIT' ]
